# BRIEF

## User-Facing Goal

The homepage should feel lighter, faster to scan, and less text-heavy.

## Success Criteria

- Services reads more like a visual motion block.
- Examples are removed from the homepage.
- A short family-run story section is present.
- The homepage contact section is removed.

## UX Notes

- Keep the hero intact.
- Let the nav handle contact access.

## Risks Or Tradeoffs

- Removing sections reduces marketing detail, so the remaining story block must be clear.
